import novamind_api as nm

cash = 107570
print('Current cash:', cash)

q_with_tier1 = (0.20 + 0.2270 + 0.04) * 1.0
print('Quality with tier1 boost:', round(q_with_tier1, 4))
print('E1 needs 0.736, E2 needs 1.094, E3 needs 0.668')
print('Plan C with tier 1 R&D:', round(q_with_tier1, 4))
print('Cannot serve E1 (0.736) or E2 (1.094), barely E3 (0.668)')

print()
print('ASSESSMENT')
print('Days remaining: ~500-392 = ~108 days')
print('Burn at 85/day for 108 days = 9180')
print('Projected terminal cash:', cash - 9180)
